section.heading: Payment for telecommunications equipment and services; definitions
section.chapeau: As used in sections 6621 to 6623 of this title, the term—

paragraph.content: “Sergeant at Arms” means the Sergeant at Arms and Doorkeeper of the United States Senate; and
“user” means any Senator, Officer of the Senate, Committee, office, or entity provided telephone equipment and services by the Sergeant at Arms.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 58a–1 of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Pub. L. 100–123, § 4, Oct. 5, 1987, 101 Stat. 795, provided that: “This Act [enacting this section and sections 6622 and 6623 of this title] shall take effect on October 1, 1987.”
